name: Rubka
summary: rubka: The official Python SDK for the Rubika Bot API, provided by Rubika. This library offers a robust and feature-rich interface for developers to build advanced bots on the Rubika platform. Features include comprehensive support for messaging, media, inline keyboards, group/channel management, user authentication, subscription systems, and real-time event handling. Built for scalability and ease of use.
author: Mahdi Ahmadi
